## Summary

- 

## Lifecycle Checklist

- [ ] I tested this locally or updated tests.
- [ ] This change does not deploy automatically from the PR.
- [ ] If this affects distributed app behavior, it is intended for the Test channel first.
- [ ] If this touches production release manifests, maintainers explicitly approved the production promotion.
- [ ] If this touches data/schema, migrations and rollback considerations are documented.

## Data Safety

- [ ] No production secrets, APK binaries, private user data, or unsanitized production exports are committed.
- [ ] Test/demo behavior uses seeded synthetic data or an approved sanitized snapshot.
